casual_leave.notes: Cannot be clubbed with sick leave

sick_leave.approval: Inform manager same day, apply in HRMS within 2 days
sick_leave.notes: Medical certificate mandatory if sick leave > 2 days

privilege_leave.encashment: Up to 10 days per year during appraisal cycle

maternity_leave.eligibility: Female employees with 80 days worked in 12 months
maternity_leave.adoption_leave: 12 weeks for adoption of child < 3 months
maternity_leave.approval: HR Department — apply 8 weeks before due date

comp_off.eligibility: Employees who work on public holidays or weekends
comp_off.validity: Must be availed within 60 days of the working holiday

wfh_policy.eligibility: Confirmed employees who have completed 6 months
wfh_policy.days_allowed: Up to 2 days per week for most roles
wfh_policy.approval_process: Apply in HRMS by Friday 5 PM for the following week. Manager approves.
wfh_policy.equipment_policy: Company provides laptop. Employee provides stable internet (min 10 Mbps).
wfh_policy.core_hours_wfh: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM IST — must be reachable
wfh_policy.day_restrictions: WFH cannot be taken on Monday and Friday simultaneously in the same week
wfh_policy.revocation: Manager can revoke WFH if performance is affected. 1 week notice given.

attendance_policy.flexible_window: Can arrive between 8:30 AM and 10:30 AM

late_policy.after_grace: Marked as late arrival. 3 lates in a month = half day deducted
late_policy.habitual_late: More than 5 lates per month = written warning

attendance_policy.half_day: Employees can mark half-day in HRMS. Min 4 hours on-site.
attendance_policy.biometric: Biometric punch-in required on all office days

expense_reimbursement.submission_deadline: Within 30 days of expense. No exceptions.

travel.local_cab: Actuals up to Rs 1,500 per day with receipt
travel.intercity_flight: Economy class. Must be booked via company travel desk.
travel.per_diem: Rs 1,200/day for Tier-1 cities. Rs 800/day for other cities.
travel.hotel: Up to Rs 4,000/night Tier-1, Rs 2,500/night others. HR pre-approval needed above limits.

meals.client_meals: Up to Rs 2,000 per person per meal — Manager + Finance approval
meals.team_meals: Up to Rs 500 per person with prior Manager approval

client_entertainment.approval: Department Head + Finance. Submit guest list and purpose.

expense_reimbursement.process: Submit Expense Report form in HRMS. Attach all receipts. Reimbursed in next payroll cycle.

dress_code.monday_to_thursday: Business casual. No torn jeans, shorts, or sleeveless.
dress_code.friday_casual: Smart casual. Jeans acceptable. No beachwear.
dress_code.client_visit_days: Formal business attire. Suit/saree/salwar preferred. ID badge mandatory.
dress_code.id_badge: Must be worn visibly at all times in office
dress_code.violation: First offense — verbal warning. Repeat — written warning.

company_holidays.holiday: Company Foundation Day (half-day Friday Aug 15 counts)

holiday_list_2025.restricted_holidays: Employees may choose 2 additional days from a restricted holiday list (Eid, Pongal, etc.) — apply in HRMS by January 31.

timeline.April 1: Increment letters and new salary effective

appraisal_policy.pip: Performance Improvement Plan: 90-day structured improvement with weekly check-ins

probation_policy.extension: May be extended by 3 months — communicated 30 days before end date
probation_policy.confirmation_process: Manager submits Confirmation Form to HR by Month 5. HR sends offer letter by end of Month 6.
probation_policy.leave_during_probation: Only sick leave and bereavement leave allowed. No CL/PL/WFH.

notice_period.buyout: Notice period can be bought out at Basic Salary per day
notice_period.garden_leave: Company can place employee on garden leave during notice
notice_period.full_and_final: F&F settlement within 45 days of last working day

process: Step 1: Raise with direct Manager verbally. Resolution in 5 working days.
Step 2: If unresolved, raise formal grievance in HRMS or email to hr@technovance.com.
Step 3: HR Investigation — HR will acknowledge within 2 days and resolve within 15 working days.
Step 4: If still unresolved, escalate to HR Head. Final decision in 10 working days.
Step 5: External mediation if internal resolution fails.
grievance_policy.confidentiality: All grievances are handled confidentially. No retaliation policy.
grievance_policy.posh_committee: For sexual harassment — contact POSH Committee at posh@technovance.com
